items.example: The city centre is always crowded at weekends.
The market is very lively in the morning.
The air in industrial areas is heavily polluted.
This neighbourhood is very safe, even at night.
The city has many modern skyscrapers.
We walked through the historic district of the city.
The new square is very spacious and open.
I prefer quiet residential areas to busy centres.
The public transport system is very convenient.
The atmosphere in the old town is very charming.
